channel.title: Ying-Fan Lin Field Notes
channel.description: Groundwater memory, transformation uncertainty, and subsurface energy intelligence.

item.title: Drawdown Is Measured; Transmissivity Is Interpreted
item.description: The most useful sentence for explaining transformation uncertainty to groundwater engineers.

item.title: From Pumping Tests to Decision Uncertainty
item.description: A field test becomes valuable when its interpretation uncertainty is propagated into a decision endpoint.

item.title: Delay Effects in Thermal Response Tests
item.description: TRT and subsurface heat projects inherit groundwater uncertainty when flow, boundary, storage, or memory effects are active.

item.title: Why Groundwater Response Can Arrive Late
item.description: Delayed response is not only a curve-fitting issue when recovery time or control timing matters.
